## Checklist
- [ ] My component builds successfully with `npm run render`
- [ ] I've added metadata in `lib/component-meta.ts` (if new component)
- [ ] The preview shows correctly on the website
- [ ] My code follows the [contribution guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I've tested on both light and dark themes
